title: aspidium elatum
intro: Aspidium elatum, also known as the Elate fern, is a type of fern native to the mountainous regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the Elate fern can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to aid in detoxification and promote overall well-being.
